summary: P1 Data Consistency Verification - Iteration 54. Backend tests: 18/20 passed (90%). Frontend tests: 100% passed. Found 1 data consistency issue: /api/trade/history endpoint doesn't return commission field for older trades (31/34 trades missing commission). The Daily Projection table correctly shows Commission column and uses stored trade_log values for completed trades.

minor.issue: Commission field missing for 31/34 trades - older trades created before commission feature don't have commission field in response. The /api/trade/logs endpoint handles this with Pydantic default, but /api/trade/history returns raw data.
minor.fix_suggestion: Add commission default in the enriched_trades loop: 'commission': trade.get('commission', 0)

action_items: Fix /api/trade/history endpoint to default commission to 0 for backward compatibility (line ~1334 in server.py)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: /api/trade/history (line 1334) should add 'commission': trade.get('commission', 0) to ensure backward compatibility
Backend: Reset tracker correctly deletes deposits and trade_logs (lines 1067-1075)
Backend: Complete onboarding correctly creates trade_logs with lot_size=balance/980, projected_profit=lot_size*15, commission (lines 5144-5174)
Frontend: Daily Projection correctly uses stored trade_log values via hasStoredTradeData check (lines 202-214)
Frontend: Balance calculation correctly includes commission: runningBalance += actualProfit + commission (line 302)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Data Consistency Verification completed. Key formulas verified: lot_size = balance/980, projected_profit = lot_size*15. Daily Projection uses stored trade_log values for completed trades (hasStoredTradeData check). Commission column visible in Daily Projection table. Minor issue: /api/trade/history needs to default commission to 0 for backward compatibility with older trades.

features_verified.trade_history_returns_consistent_data: PARTIAL - commission field missing for older trades
